mapper.select: select id, type, name, description, content, generator, generate_time as generateTime, start_time as startTime, end_time as endTime, status, file_path as filePath, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from report order by generate_time desc limit #{limit}
select type, count(1) as count from report group by type order by count desc
select count(1) from report where type = #{type}
select count(1) from report where date(generate_time) = curdate()
